title: Antam Gold Rebounds to Rp 3.049 Million as Safe-Haven Demand Rises

title: JCI Surges 1.56% as Wall Street Rally Lifts Asian Markets

title: Gov't Launches Rp 5 Trillion Subsidized Rice Program to Contain Inflation

title: Indonesia Freezes $859 Million in Shares in Mirae Asset Insider Trading Probe

title: JCI Slumps 4.6% as Fitch Outlook Cut and Middle East War Rattle Markets

title: SMBC Indonesia Profit Plunges 82% in 2025 Despite Loan Growth
